title: Sant Tulsidas
actors: Vishnupant Pagnis, Leela Chitnis, Keshavrao Date
plot: Big-budget miracle-laden saint film on Tulsidas (16th C). who rewrote Valmiki's 'Ramayana' in Hindi. To the despair of his teacher Narahari Guru (Sohoni), who hopes that Tulsidas (Pagnis) will make the classic text accessible to t...
